# Blocked Topics — Trend Post Automation
#
# Add one keyword/phrase per line (case-insensitive partial match).
# Any trend-post issue whose keyword matches a line here will be blocked
# from automatic draft generation. The issue will receive a comment explaining
# the block, and the request must be handled manually.
#
# Lines starting with # are comments and are ignored.
# Blank lines are ignored.

# ── Regulated / liability-risk content ──────────────────────────────────────
financial advice
investment advice
legal advice
medical advice
health claim
cure
diagnose
treat disease

# ── Competitor brand names (avoid generating posts about competitors) ────────
# Add specific competitor names below as needed:
# competitor-name-here

# ── Sensitive / reputational topics ─────────────────────────────────────────
lawsuit
litigation
scandal

# ── Compliance / YMYL areas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
cryptocurrency investment
crypto trading
forex trading
